title: Content Marketing Associate
description: Join PepsiCo's marketing team to create compelling content that engages our consumers and builds brand loyalty.
responsibilities: Develop content strategies for digital and traditional channels
Create written, visual, and video content
Manage content calendars and publishing workflows
Analyze content performance and optimize engagement
Collaborate with creative and brand teams

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
